name: Squats
description: Stand shoulder-width apart, brace your core, drive hips back, and keep knees tracking over your toes through each rep.

name: Pile Squats
description: Take a wide stance with toes turned out, lower straight down, and keep your chest tall while knees follow the toe line.

name: Standing Calf Raise
description: Stand tall, rise through the balls of your feet, pause at the top, and lower slowly without rolling the ankles.

name: Split Lunges
description: Step forward with control, keep the front knee stacked above the ankle, and maintain a tall torso as you return.
